_synthetic: Committed demo/test fixture for the §8.3 owner-statement reconciliation harness. Invented numbers, no real data (§6.6). Represents AppFolio's owner statement for owner o_1 (properties 101 Moss Dr + 102 Buckley Ave), closed period 2026-06. Totals are hand-matched to ownerPeriodTotals(owner-financials fixture, owner:o_1, 2026-06) so a correct aggregate reconciles GREEN; the drift test in owner-aggregate.test.ts mutates a copy to force RED.
